prompt_queue.prompt: Read the Runtime task named inputs JSON block first, then the Runtime task input JSON block. Use concept_packet and design_packet directly when present; if only artifacts entries are present, use artifacts.concept_packet.payload and artifacts.design_packet.payload. When those packet payloads are present, build the candidate from them and do not report missing runtime input. Produce one StaticSiteCandidate artifact with an index.html file and call emit_typed_artifact exactly once with the StaticSiteCandidate payload.
